what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment ledger entry that records an image asset linked to the design-source channel, identifying it by id, attachment type, target URI, and creation timestamp.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no body text.
It belongs to channel 'design-source' and attachment_type 'images'.
The target is the custom URI 'image://design-source/capital-raise/p-09'.
It records an ISO 8601 timestamp '2026-06-22T11:30:58.832649+00:00' for when it was added.
standouts: The target URI uses a custom 'image://' scheme pointing to 'design-source/capital-raise/p-09'.
The file is purely metadata: id, channel, type, target, timestamp.
The attachment id is a hash-prefixed slug 'att-2190080b'.
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter ledger-card format.
Uses a channel-memory attachment naming convention 'att-<hash>.md'.
References an external image asset via a structured URI rather than a filesystem path.
concerns: The image target URI is not resolvable or verifiable from within this file alone.
There is no caption, alt text, mime type, or dimensions describing the image.
No author or source revision is recorded.
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger pointer that registers an image asset under the design-source channel for the capital-raise set.
questions: Who added this attachment and why?
What does 'p-09' signify within the capital-raise set?
Is the target URI resolvable elsewhere in the system?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated beyond the metadata fields; the file accurately functions as an attachment ledger record.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, timestamped reference from a channel memory entry to a specific image asset in a design source collection.
novelty: It uses a custom 'image://' URI target within a channel-memory attachment ledger entry, with a hash-based attachment id.
contribution: It contributes a canonical attachment record—id, channel, type, target URI, and timestamp—that a fused system could keep as a stable pointer to an image asset.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment ledger entry for the design-source channel that references the image asset 'image://design-source/capital-raise/p-09' and records its addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register and timestamp an image asset reference in the design-source channel memory.
